minting_now.name: TREND APP NFT V2
minting_now.description:
Imagine being one of the earliest investors in Facebook, TikTok, or Instagram—before the world realized their potential. Now, imagine if your investment wasn’t just a bet on growth but a guaranteed piece of ownership in the company itself.
That’s exactly what the TREND App Inc. NFT Collection offers
